overall.description: Static cinematic establishing shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront. The scene features a dense skyline of towering skyscrapers with industrial smokestacks emitting smoke, a prominent red truss bridge spanning the murky river, and floating dock structures along the shore, all bathed in bright midday sunlight with no camera movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic industrial waterfront with floating docks

agents.ego_description: stationary aerial observation of the cyberpunk cityscape from a fixed vantage point over the river

entered.detail: large red metal bridge structure spanning across the river with industrial piping
multiple tall smokestacks emitting white smoke into the sky
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with futuristic architecture and neon accents
series of floating structures and boats moored along the muddy shoreline
greenish-brown water filling the foreground of the scene
tall building with large red vertical signage on the left edge

segments.scene_description: A static aerial view of a cyberpunk waterfront district, showcasing a sprawling futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers, industrial smokestacks, and a prominent red bridge. The murky river fills the foreground with floating dock platforms visible along the shore, while bright midday sun illuminates the entire scene with no visible movement or activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static aerial perspective of a sprawling cyberpunk waterfront district bathed in bright midday sunlight. It begins with a wide view of the futuristic cityscape, where towering skyscrapers and industrial smokestacks dominate the horizon. The gaze then settles on a prominent red truss bridge that spans across the murky river. Finally, the scene encompasses the floating dock platforms lining the shore, completing the still and silent composition of the urban industrial landscape.
